chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜高盛策略师将标普500指数目标点位上调至8000点，受AI和盈利所推动；阿里员工十三薪并入年终奖
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

程一笑：可灵AI 3月ARR近5亿美元，较去年同期增长4倍

36氪获悉，在2026年第一季度业绩电话会上，快手科技创始人兼首席执行官程一笑表示，2026年3月，可灵AI年化收入运行率（ARR）近5亿美元，较去年3月的1亿美元增长4倍。程一笑表示，可灵AI一季度收入高速增长，主要来自B端企业客户API调用收入和P端付费会员订阅收入的双轮驱动。无论是用户数还是月均付费金额，可灵AI均实现了高速增长。从留存看，B端企业客户和P端付费会员均保持较好留存趋势，体现出可灵AI在专业创作场景中的技术和产品实力。

台积电CEO：今年全员平均分红奖金涨幅将超30%

针对员工近期在网络上对激励政策提出的疑虑，台积电总裁魏哲家向内部员工表示，今年全员平均分红奖金涨幅将超30%。作为全球人工智能产业链的核心企业，台积电在业绩大增的同时，进一步扩大员工激励力度。魏哲家此番表态也反映出，在人工智能产业迎来空前繁荣、企业营收大幅增长的大背景下，行业龙头企业面

chinese_news.title: 前两天，我们在亦庄听到了AI最真实的声音｜2026 AI Partner大会金句实录
chinese_news.summary:
当大模型API调用成本一年内骤降超过80%，百万Token仅需几分钱时，产业竞争便不再纠结于技术指标的高低，而是回归到最朴素的价值衡量——能否在实际场景中降本增效。行业的聚光灯，从实验室的榜单，转向了真实的生产线、医院诊室、物流仓库和城市管理后台。

2026年，谁能在复杂场景中解决真问题，谁才是这场变革的主角。

5月19日至20日，以“带着AI去前线”为主题的2026 AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会在北京经开区通明湖会展中心举办。大会由北京经开区管委会指导、36氪主办、国家信创园承办，设置9场圆桌对话、22场主题演讲以及一场别开生面的“世界咖啡”AI+产业对接会。60位国内领军企业代表齐聚一堂，13家带着真场景、真预算、真痛点的需求方与36家技术方面对面碰撞。

正如36氪CEO冯大刚在开场中所说：“大多数人走进通明湖会展中心，心里想的是同一件事——不是来听AI有多厉害，是来看看AI到底能不能用、怎么用、花多少钱用，能创造多大价值。”

一位参会企业代表感慨：“以前参加AI会议，大家还在讨论‘未来能

chinese_news.title: 经过华为、传音、拓竹历练，95后打造AI母婴界特斯拉｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，AI母婴智能硬件品牌珂迪Coddie（以下简称“Coddie”）完成天使轮融资，融资金额数千万元，由钟鼎资本投资，向阳资本担任独家财务顾问。

Coddie团队于2026年初组建，由95后连续创业者何鋡威创立。何鋡威毕业于德国慕尼黑工业大学，先后任职华为、传音控股、拓竹科技等全球化科技企业。技术负责人毕业于国内顶级高校计算机专业，曾就职半导体龙头上市公司，负责大疆与Insta360影像IC方案落地；后加入国家“小巨人”第三代半导体企业担任产品负责人，具备复杂产品研发的深厚技术背景，以及前沿方案的系统整合能力。

当前全球母婴家庭面临养育压力大、成本高、信息繁杂等核心痛点，而传统母婴产品仍停留在基础功能阶段，智能化程度不足、生态割裂，无法满足新一代家庭需求。事实上，母婴智能设备在全球已发展多年，智能喂养、发育监测和孕产科技也成为全球增速较快的核心品类。

“我们觉得AI来了，很多行业都要重做。育儿赛道过去拼营销、拼

chinese_news.title: 化险为夷的洛克王国，给所有长青游戏上了一课
chinese_news.summary:
文丨果脯

2026年5月21日，腾讯魔方工作室群开发的《洛克王国：世界》上线了S2赛季更新。这款基于13年经典IP、以精灵收集养成为核心的大世界游戏，在2026年3月底正式上线后迅速成为年度爆款。据官方数据，游戏上线9天用户量便突破3000万，全平台预约人数达6000万，DAU达到1300万。 

S2赛季上线前，这款产品更是被寄予厚望，腾讯方面称其“有望成为下一款长青产品”。此时，距离《三角洲行动》正式官宣跻身“长青游戏”，也才过去一个季度。 

出乎所有人意料的是，5月21日S2赛季更新后，事情迅速脱离了轨道。 

几天之内，玩家社区出现大量争议，游戏B站��方动态评论数一度突破百万。彼时，玩家发现游戏出现了大量未在版本公告中提及的修改内容，并且多个已于S1赛季修复的Bug重新出现。这套前所未有的重大运营失误，一度让玩家揣测《洛克王国：世界》的成功，令团

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜男士美妆品牌「GREENLAB绿所」获宝顶创投战略投资，张耀东出任公司董事
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，无感化面部理容品牌「GREENLAB绿所」（以下简称“绿所”）近日宣布完成千万级新一轮融资，本轮由宝顶创投战略投资。融资完成后，宝顶创投创始合伙人张耀东将出任绿所公司董事，参与品牌战略、产品矩阵、渠道经营等方面的长期建设。

这也是继2025年完成Pre-A轮融资后，绿所在半年左右时间内再次获得外部资本加注。据了解，本轮资金将主要用于新品研发量产、品牌建设、渠道经营及组织能力提升等方面。

绿所是36氪持续关注的品牌，定位“无感化面部理容”，重点面向“精致懒”的年轻男性用户。所谓“无感化”，指的是用户在购买、使用和呈现效果上都尽量没有心理负担：产品要自然、方便、高效，不需要复杂技巧，也不希望被明显看出“化妆感”。

chinese_news.title: 硅谷AI一线观察：一人花掉50万美金Token背后的大厂焦虑
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨 邓咏仪

编辑｜张雨忻

硅谷持续了两个多月的Token-Maxxing（Token军备竞赛）焦虑，在Meta以一种戏谑的方式按下了休止符。

前情大家都知道了：2026年3月，为了鼓吹自己是一家“AI-Native”公司，Meta曾在内部上线了一个“Claudeonomics（Claude经济学）”榜单：员工消耗的Token越多，排名就越高；垫底的员工，有被裁的风险。

不过，当我们在4月末来到硅谷，Meta的朋友带来了故事的后续：榜单上线一个月后，第一名的员工将Token消耗刷到了近50万美金/月，折合近3000亿个Token。

不久后，Meta下架了这个榜单。至于下架原因，公司内没有明确说法，但员工猜测是因为“畸形竞争下消耗的token成本已远超Meta预期”。

2026年硅谷的开局，很焦虑，很魔幻。

“你要是半

chinese_news.title: 红杉、华兴投了「AI产品的大众点评」，我们与它的02年创始人聊了聊
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨

编辑｜张雨忻

打开“观猹”，能看到一个完全不同于机构投资榜单所呈现出来的AI创业生态：

这里很少有动辄估值几亿美金的项目，活跃在社区中的，也常常不是有着名校、大厂背景的创业者，更多是普通的设计师、产品经理，甚至退休教师。

观猹。

“观猹”创始人仲泰告诉我：“这才是AI行业最真实的生态。”

TOP3大新闻

商品标签陷性暗示争议，盒马致歉并下架整改

近日，盒马旗下一款“粉木耳”产品因标签设计涉嫌性暗示引发争议。图片显示，该产品名为“盒马菌菇星球贵妃粉耳”，产地为山东，产品标签右侧有一个女性侧面剪影，并配文“粉嘟嘟，蘑菇届萌新”。

有不少网友表示，该设计容易让人联想到低俗色情内容，涉嫌打擦边球，观感不适。据中新经纬，5月25日晚，盒马回应称，对于商品标签造成的不适，向广大网友和消费者郑重道歉。盒马表示，相关商品已在收到反馈后全部下架，并内部复盘和改进上架审核流程。盒马坚决反对展示和传递低俗不良信息，将持续加强商品品质和标签审核，

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph reports miner inflows to Binance surging while BTC struggles to hold uptrend; market pricing $70K as next resistance test amid regulatory clarity from CFTC prediction market proposal.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum outperform Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio) by end of 2026-06-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph flags $2B short squeeze risk on Ether around $2K; concurrent macro shift toward AI infrastructure spending (Snowflake $6B AWS commitment, Meta AI subscription launch) could favor smart-contract chains.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (short positioning), CNBC (Snowflake, Meta AI spend)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will CFTC gain exclusive prediction market regulatory authority by 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC reports White House eyeing CFTC proposal for exclusive federal jurisdiction over prediction markets; Polymarket weighing KYC amid global crackdown—regulatory clarity is imminent and directly impacts platform risk.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (CFTC proposal, White House interest), Cointelegraph (Polymarket KYC)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Iran-US Strait of Hormuz reopening take longer than 1 month of deal signing by 2026-08-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Kalshi traders already skeptical of Iran timeline; Rubio says US will give talks 'every chance' but Trump says 'not satisfied' yet—oil markets repricing slowly; this market has real shipping/commodity hedging demand.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Rubio, oil fall 5%), BBC (Trump Iran deal skepticism), Kalshi (trader skepticism)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Snowflake (SNOW) stock close above its 52-week high by 2026-11-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC reports 36% earnings-beat rally on $6B AWS/Graviton commitment; cloud infrastructure spending is accelerating; stock momentum and AWS lock-in create sustained bull case.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Goldman Sachs' revised S&P 500 target of 8000 be exceeded by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bloomberg S&P 500 Index closing price, Goldman Sachs public price targets
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reports Goldman raised SPX target to 8000 on AI + earnings tailwinds; most prediction markets ignore macro equity index targets; retail crypto crowd underweights macro equity moves.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr (Goldman 8000 target), strong earnings momentum in Snowflake, Meta AI capex boom

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Kuling AI (快手可灵) ARR exceed $1 billion annualized by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Kuaishou (FAST) investor relations, 36Kr reporting on Kuling quarterly updates
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr (Chinese-exclusive): Kuling AI ARR hit ~$500M in March 2026, 4x YoY growth; English media has zero coverage; at this trajectory, hitting $1B ARR is plausible but unpriced in Western markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr exclusive reporting on Kuling ARR $500M milestone; Hacker News consensus on AI product-market fit; API cost collapse accelerating customer acquisition

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Meta's AI subscription service reach 10M+ paid subscribers by 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Meta investor relations, earnings calls, third-party subscriber estimates (Sensor Tower, app store data)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports Meta launching AI subscription from $7.99/month; no early adoption data yet; crypto/tech Twitter underestimates Meta's ability to monetize 3B+ users at low price tiers.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Meta AI subscription test), 36Kr (token cost collapse driving margins), Hacker News (Anthropic/OpenAI product-market fit discussion)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Polymarket enforce global KYC requirements by 2026-06-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Polymarket public announcement, SEC/CFTC enforcement actions, Polymarket user interface policy page
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports Polymarket weighing KYC; CNBC reports CFTC/White House regulatory push; early adoption of KYC could signal platform confidence in regulatory deal or fear of shutdown—market currently underprices binary outcome.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (KYC deliberation), CNBC (CFTC proposal), CoinDesk (Google insider trading case on Polymarket increases regulatory heat)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Block's Cash App stablecoin reach 5M+ active users by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Block investor relations, Cash App user data, third-party payment analytics
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports Cash App phased stablecoin rollout to ~60M users; rollout friction could slow adoption, but even 8-10% penetration is material; market lacks liquid contracts on stablecoin adoption velocity.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Block stablecoin launch), BIS tokenization research (faster cross-border payments boost demand), Jefferies (crypto IPO/tokenization wave narrative)

investment_theses.thesis: Long cloud infrastructure plays (SNOW, CRWD, NET) as AI capex cycle drives enterprise AWS/GCP/Azure consumption through 2026-Q4; Snowflake's $6B AWS commitment is bellwether.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Snowflake 36% rally on $6B AWS/Graviton spend commitment
36Kr: Goldman Sachs raised SPX target to 8000 on AI + earnings
CoinDesk: BIS finds tokenization accelerates cross-border payments (enterprise adoption narrative)
investment_theses.counter_view: Cloud valuations already repriced for AI capex; guidance disappointment (like Zscaler's -31% on prudent guidance) shows sentiment fragility; macro rate regime could shift if Fed cuts stall.
investment_theses.expression: Long SNOW, short ZS (contrarian positioning), or long XLK/XLC (broad sector) vs. short TLT (rate duration bet)

investment_theses.thesis: Crypto regulatory clarity (CFTC exclusive jurisdiction) reduces tail risk on prediction markets; long Polymarket-exposed positions and prediction market platforms as KYC implementation signals compliance pathway.
supporting_signals: CNBC: CFTC proposal for exclusive prediction market authority eyed by White House
CoinDesk: Google engineer insider-trading case on Polymarket (enforcement narrative drives clarity demand)
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory deal could impose restrictions (KYC, limits on US participation) that throttle liquidity; state-by-state regulation may prevail if CFTC loses bureaucratic battle; political risk if Trump admin changes priorities.
investment_theses.expression: Long governance tokens of decentralized prediction platforms (if liquid), or long crypto equities exposed to regulatory tailwind (Coinbase, MicroStrategy) vs. short prediction-market volatility indices

investment_theses.thesis: China AI API cost collapse + rapid scaling of Kuling AI (36Kr: $500M ARR, 4x YoY) signals margin compression in global LLM market; long ETH/BTC as smart-contract inference demand (zkML, on-chain AI agents) offsets commoditization.
supporting_signals: 36Kr (Chinese exclusive): Kuling AI ARR $500M in March, 4x growth YoY
36Kr: API costs down 80%+ in 1 year, tokenization replacing benchmark competition
Hacker News: Consensus that Anthropic/OpenAI have 'product-market fit' (commoditization phase)
investment_theses.counter_view: ETH execution risk (Shanghai, Dencun upgrades have disappointed on performance); BTC dominance may persist on macro risk-off; on-chain inference still experimental, adoption slow.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via perpetual swap (binance ETH-PERP vs. BTC-PERP), or long Solana (cheaper on-chain inference target), hedge with short SPY (equity downside in deflation scenario)

investment_theses.thesis: Meta's AI subscription ($7.99/month) will drive 50M+ paid tiers by end-2026; creator and SMB monetization through AI tooling is underpriced; long Meta (META) as AI capex narrative matures into margin recovery.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Meta testing AI subscription from $7.99/month
Hacker News: Broad consensus that Anthropic/OpenAI have product-market fit, spillover to Meta ecosystem
36Kr: Token-maxxing internal competition at Meta (Claudeo joke) signals aggressive AI product velocity
investment_theses.counter_view: Subscription adoption could disappoint (user habit inertia); AI capex drag on margins through 2026; regulatory headwinds on data usage for model training; competition from OpenAI + Anthropic direct-to-consumer.
investment_theses.expression: Long META stock or META call spreads (4-6 month ATM); or long broad tech (QQQ) vs. short treasury duration (long TLT puts) as AI deflation narrative shifts

investment_theses.thesis: Iran-US deal uncertainty (Trump 'not satisfied', Rubio cautious, Kalshi traders skeptical) keeps oil volatility elevated; long crude (WTI) call spreads with 2026-07-31 expiry; geopolitical tail risk repricing is slow.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Oil fell 5% on Rubio optimism, but traders doubt Strait reopening within 1 month of deal
BBC: Trump says 'not satisfied' with Iran terms
Kalshi: Traders pricing low probability on rapid Strait reopening
investment_theses.counter_view: Deal could suddenly materialize (Trump negotiation speed precedent); oil markets already hedged for geopolitical risk; recession fears (food insecurity data from NY Fed) could outweigh supply disruption premium.
investment_theses.expression: Long WTI call spread (60-70 strike, 2026-07-31 expiry) or long XLE (energy sector ETF) vs. short SPY (portfolio macro hedge on recession tail risk)
